name: ERP Test / Scenario / UI / API / Report Generation Knowledge Pack
description: Generation rules for everything around a generated ERP's behaviour and surface: test-generation patterns (accounting balance, negative-stock, maker-checker, RBAC, immutability, audit, P&L/Balance-Sheet consistency, reversal equivalence), Playwright end-to-end scenarios, UI page scaffolding (list/detail/create/edit, server-side search/filter/sort/pagination, status badges), REST API scaffolding (GET/POST per entity, DomainException->400, DTO validation), report generation (GL, party statement, trial balance, P&L, balance sheet, AR/AP ageing, stock balance), dashboard KPI rules, and eight named real-life ERP acceptance scenarios written as test specs.
license: Original professional summaries of widely-established ERP, accounting and software-engineering principles, authored for LocalAIFactory as code-generation guidance. Free to deploy and modify within the application. No vendor documentation, ERPNext/Frappe/SAP text, or any third-party copyrighted material is reproduced verbatim. Principles are framed honestly with confidence levels; no certification or jurisdiction-specific compliance is asserted.
